$description: Robert DeLanghe personal content tokens — canonical brand copy. The verbal half of the design system: one source of truth for words, the way tokens.json is for visuals. Surfaces (and other repos) may extend this with their own content/strings.json; the content tool merges core + per-repo.

tagline.$value: AI agents ship code. I write the contracts that keep them in check.
tagline.$description: Primary tagline — hero / link cards / titles.

description.$value: Senior software engineer building the controls for shipping AI-written code — capability-scoped agents, signed delivery, and contracts enforced as build failures.
description.$description: One-line description — meta description (kept ≤160 chars), intros.

thesis.$value: Draw the boundary at the door — a scope-bounded set of capabilities an agent acts through, not the process, not the container.
thesis.$description: The core bet, stated once — transcluded by posts via {{thesis}}.
